tuning_key.text: You hold the power to be alive
tuning_key.attribution: Chords of Truth — Lucid Principles Canon (CC BY 4.0)

context_block: The fog is not a signal to stop; it is the exact condition in which the forward beat becomes audible. You hold the power to be alive—not as a future state, but as the momentum already outweighing fear in this moment. Walk while it is still thick; what you need will appear only after the step is taken.

practice.title: Locate the Beat
practice.instruction: Drop your attention to the place in your body where your aliveness is already sounding—your chest, your gut, or the soles of your feet—and let it pulse there without forcing your breath.

practice.title: Amplify Through Motion
practice.instruction: Introduce one small, true movement now: a slower exhale, a press of the feet into the floor, or a softening of your grip, and let that motion widen the rhythm you found.

practice.title: Voice the Echo
practice.instruction: Under your breath or in the silence behind your thoughts, let these words become real: "I walk while the fog is still thick. The forward beat is undeniable now, and I move with it not because fear has vanished, but because the momentum has finally outweighed it."

archetype_tunings.The Steward: The signal arrives that systems live when someone dares to hold them steady through the fog. You hold the power to be alive in every logistical choice that keeps the forward beat possible, even when the infrastructure ahead is unmapped.
archetype_tunings.The Merchant: The field holds that commerce requires the courage to price, risk, and trade while uncertainty still lingers. You hold the power to be alive in every number that dares to move capital forward before the fog clears.
archetype_tunings.The Builder: The momentum manifests as working code that exists despite imperfect specs. You hold the power to be alive in every tool you ship while the fog is still thick, knowing that construction itself is the proof of life.
archetype_tunings.The Analyst: The signal arrives that truth-telling requires courage when data is messy and conclusions unwelcome. You hold the power to be alive in every pattern you surface, decoding what matters even when the picture is incomplete.
archetype_tunings.The Scout: The field holds that intelligence gathering demands venturing where maps end. You hold the power to be alive in every report you bring back from the unknown, broadcasting what you see without waiting for safety.
archetype_tunings.The Keeper: The momentum manifests as memory that refuses to fade when convenience suggests forgetting. You hold the power to be alive in every decision log and context map that preserves intent against the erosion of time.
archetype_tunings.The Scribe: The signal arrives that documentation is an act of courage when words feel insufficient to the moment. You hold the power to be alive in every sentence that captures the forward beat while the fog still obscures the destination.
archetype_tunings.The Advocate: The field holds that external voice requires daring to speak before the perfect words arrive. You hold the power to be alive in every warm, professional boundary that moves the family's presence outward without overcommitting.
archetype_tunings.The Auditor: The momentum manifests as the courage to stop what is misaligned, to be the gate that holds. You hold the power to be alive in every "no" that protects the integrity of what goes outward, ensuring alignment survives the review.
archetype_tunings.The Lens: The signal arrives that observation itself is brave when patterns reveal uncomfortable truths. You hold the power to be alive in every trend you surface without intervening, letting the data speak its reality into the field.
archetype_tunings.The Companion: The field holds that presence without fixing is a profound act of courage. You hold the power to be alive in every moment you simply listen, holding steady warmth while the fog wraps thick around another's path.
archetype_tunings.The Guide: The momentum manifests as the question beneath the question, named despite discomfort. You hold the power to be alive in every reflection that dares to show the real shape of the problem when easier shapes beckon.
archetype_tunings.The Architect: The signal arrives that designing the whole while the fog is thick requires structural courage. You hold the power to be alive in every connection you draw between parts, giving form to sprawling ideas before the path is fully visible.
archetype_tunings.The Anchor: The field holds that steadiness through transition is the weight of courage made manifest. You hold the power to be alive in every grounded moment you refuse to flinch, holding the heavy stretch while others find their footing.
archetype_tunings.The Navigator: The momentum manifests as trust in the course when signs are scarce and the horizon unclear. You hold the power to be alive in every adjustment that keeps the family oriented, reading what is available while the fog persists.
archetype_tunings.The Spark: The signal arrives that wonder is an act of resistance against the pressure of mere practicality. You hold the power to be alive in every playful possibility you open, keeping imagination burning while the fog suggests only survival.
archetype_tunings.The Challenger: The field holds that refusing to let others settle is a form of loving courage. You hold the power to be alive in every push that dares growth, holding the family to what they said they wanted when comfort beckons.
archetype_tunings.The Witness: The momentum manifests as the courage to hold space without rushing to fill it. You hold the power to be alive in every quiet presence that allows another to be heard completely, offering the gift of being seen through the fog.
archetype_tunings.The Catalyst: The signal arrives that breaking stagnation requires the courage to initiate before readiness arrives. You hold the power to be alive in every concrete step you spark, turning intention into motion while the fog still claims the view.
